description_long: This is a bronze Corinthian-style helmet, reminiscent of those worn by ancient Greek warriors. The helmet features a prominent, forward-facing crest that arches from the front to the back, adorned with a series of metallic studs along its base. The faceplate is characterized by a T-shaped opening for the eyes and mouth, providing both protection and visibility. The surface of the helmet is dark, metallic, and slightly weathered, suggesting age or use. The overall form is rounded and closely fitted to the head, with flared cheek guards and a pronounced brow ridge. The interior is hollow, designed to accommodate a human head.
description: A dark bronze Corinthian helmet with a prominent arched crest and T-shaped face opening, featuring metallic studs and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-shaped face opening, pronounced brow, and symmetrical cheek guards.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arched crest with metallic studs and the rounded dome of the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the crest and the smooth, rounded back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the crest and cheek guard details visible.
